author: Michael Y.
pros: Address Two is easy to use but also very powerful. The ability to customize a lot of the system is a big benefit. The interface is also simple to use. Then the features are fantastic, including the ability to do mass marketing emails straight from the system, the ability to have emails automatically copied into the customer record, the ability to track customer order status through the pipeline, and the ability to do large data uploads easily. All of that in one system for a reasonable price made this the easy choice. We started using it three years ago just to maintain our customer records, but we've grown our database 10x and now use all of its advanced features.
cons: Being able to do reporting is a bit limited. There is a little functionality in the app, but you can export to excel and do a lot of analysis that way.

description: I'm in sales and AddressTwo has been crucial in my success. It's easy to track all activities for a contact and company. I regularly use it to look up past interactions with my customers. My favorite feature is copying Addy on my emails, then the messages are automatically added to that contact.
author: Monica H.
pros: Copying Addy on my emails and sorting my contacts into category lists. I also print out my activity history regularly for my company's reporting.
cons: It took a while to adjust to the new interface and I lost some data in the software. I also would like to be able to add history or other items to just the company rather than having it assigned to a contact. Sometimes I don't have a contact yet but need to keep prospecting notes on the account.

description: Troy has been incredibly supportive. It is almost too detailed for me . I would like to see a more pleasing to the eye , less complicated platform. It can be overwhelming at times.
author: Susan W.
cons: Too many features.. the platform is too much...

review_title: Address Two has Addressed Our Needs & Beyound
description: Our company has been using Address Two for over two years now. Our customer base has grown faster than we once thought possible. Address Two has helped us not only grow our customer base but serve our clients even better. Our sales team is able to track communication for ongoing projects with just a few clicks. As we all know - time is money in sales so anything to save time while providing great customer service is a bonus. As for customer service, the Address Two team is amazing. They answer any and all questions we have in a timely and professional matter second to none. Our company is looking forward to continuing our relationship with Address Two well into the future.
author: Karen W.
cons: Wish it could be a tad more customizable but we make it work for us

review_title: A wonderful addition to our small business
description: We have a small sales staff using AddressTwo. It was incredibly intuitive and simple for our size. We gave it one year as a trial to see if the reps made good use of it and we are ready to sign up for next year! One issue we have is near the search field, the reps keep clicking the "add a customer" button , because it is right next to it...instead of hitting "enter". Otherwise we have been able to see great results and not miss appointments and phone calls with the task list! Look forward to learning more every day :)
author: Carli D.
pros: Ease of use. Not overly complicated for a small business, while having all the necessary functions!

description: I have been using AddressTwo for about a year now. It is the foundation of my customer relations. Before I started using it, I often missed sales because I failed to follow up with potential clients in a timely matter. AddressTwo put a stop to that by reminding me a daily basis who I needed to meet with. I have over 1500 potential clients saved in the system and I am able to efficiently track progress with each of them. I also love the ability to forward email from clients directly into the system and automatically attach them to that client's profile.
author: John P.
pros: The ability to forward emails to the system and have them automatically attached to that client's profile. I also appreciate the daily email reminding me of what I need to do that day to keep my clients happy.
cons: I would like to see a little more streamlined look.

review_title: We've used AddressTwo for 5+ years. It is easy to input and manage data. Great business tool!
author: Louisa O.
pros: Great customer contact tools! Great reporting and ways to use lists and tasks. Easy to keep visibility on projects and reassign. (many things to like about using AddressTwo)
cons: Nothing to state. Actually, every time we have asked for help on how to do something the support team helps us to find a way to make it happen.

review_title: Great CRM Program that is simple and does what we need it to do
description: This is a great program. we have been using it for three years now and love it. We have had turn over in our sales department and never had to worry about losing contacts. Troy is great when we need help, tutoring on features and remembers who we are and send out thank you and tips on a regular basis. I cannot say enough good about addresstwo
author: Curtis H.

review_title: I love the individual attention Address Two provides as we grow together.
description: I have been working with AddressTwo for about 5 months as I rebuild my business after retirement. They have been extremely responsive to every request and idea that I have sent their way. Their CRM is simple but adaptable to most businesses. And they keep adding features to make it an even better value. Thanks, AddressTwo for being a "real" company and a solid tool for my marketing business.
author: Ron C.
pros: Adaptable to many small businesses and marketing agencies. Customizable.
cons: Not set up for multiple accounts, but can be customized for that.

description: I have been working with Address Two for almost 3 years. I have worked with 3 other CRM programs and by far this is the easiest to work with. It makes my life organized and takes a tremendous stress out of my job. I have been able to grow the business by the ability to do campaigns and increase our database. Plus I have a new friend as a result " Addy".
author: Maureen O.

description: Our experience with Address Two has been great! It is very easy to manage and user-friendly. We will refer this software to other companies.
author: Delilah E.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Address Two is Easy to Use
description: I've just starting using Address Two as a marketing tool for my small company. Adding accounts and contacts is easily done in the software. Correcting, editing and searching for contacts can be done quickly and efficiently. I will be using the email, history and newsletter components in the new year to connect with my prospective clients.
author: Terri W.

review_title: I've used AddressTwo for about 5 year
description: I find that the system gets better every year and the cost is perfect. Valuable system but not priced like Salesforce1.
author: Shae H.
cons: The app is a little bit tricky. Requires a log in each time opened.

description: I love this product and am so grateful for the time that it allows me to save! It is so nice to have all the important business data that I need daily in one location.
author: Michael G.

description: Great company to work with and always available to help. Keep up the GREAT work!! Cheers to 2017!!!
author: Mike S.

review_title: The Customer Service is Phenomenal and Timely!!!
author: Jacquelyn T.
pros: Whenever I need assistance, the pros are there to assist. No automated service at Address Two! Thank you!
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I have used CRM programs for about 20 years. AddressTwo is so user-friendly and efficient. You can work on the account and do may different things. It allows you to keep track of upcoming events - reminds you to do certain tasks and keeps track of your pipeline and on one screen. Love this software.
author: Maureen O.
pros: User-friendly. Very organized screen to work with.

review_title: Troy is the best! Always there to help and answer questions!
author: Elizabeth R.
pros: It is easy to use! The customer service is excellent, the task list is crucial to our sales life.
cons: Sometimes crashes but the staff is always prompt to help. The query search is easy once you learn it.

description: I work with clients in a number of different ways. Some of the need virtual support in their daily operations while others need help creating effective systems so that their business runs efficiently. Inevitably, no matter where we start, we always end up implementing a customer strategy that includes elements like follow up, task management, autoresponders, and newsletters just to name a few. Unfortunately, the CRM options I was used to turning to were not quite the right fit for my client base--the small to medium entrepreneurs. Some were cost prohibitive. Many either had more functions that were necessary or not enough to the point where multiple programs were needed. Then I was introduced to AddressTwo. I first implemented the use of AddressTwo for my own business and immediately realized that I'd found just the tool I was looking for to help my clients exactly how they needed to be helped. Getting started with AddressTwo was easy but was made even easier by the support I received from everyone on the A2 team. I like being able to call and get immediate attention from their support team so that I can go about my business and keep my clients moving forward. Implementing a CRM system in a business is a great step, but unless the business owner and their team can use the CRM effectively then it's not helping anyone. AddressTwo helps their customers save time and create the right environment for businesses to expand their revenue potential.
author: Holly K.

description: I'm a self-made entrepreneur and I have high standards and a short patience when it comes to the tools I used to run my business. I've tried a lot of CRMs to help manage the lead funnels for my prospective clients, and I could never find one that felt like it was really made for me and my small, but growing, business. AddressTwo was the first CRM that felt right to me, and I've been watching my sales grow since switching. The only downside is that it does not integrate into Quickbooks, but so far that hasn't really been an issue for me. Would highly recommend to anyone skeptical of CRM and looking for a product that meets the standards that they hold for their own business.
author: Gary T.
pros: I think the customer support team is great and I found it to be really intuitive once I started using it.
cons: I wish that it would integrate with more existing software that exists out there.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: AddressTwo is quick to respond to show me how to access the information I need and increase my awareness of the software's functionality. A2 lets me focus on each individual call in front of me at the time. Easy and Intuitive!
author: Rebecca M.
pros: So cost effective and easy to use. Customer experience is above expectations. They think of features you need that you didn't know you needed.

description: It is is a good program but sometimes i wish the features where a bit more complex, the system for putting a lead under a distributor who is under our salesman is not perfect.
author: Owen C.

description: I've had a wonderful experience with AddressTwo. I think that their most valuable asset is the customer service that they offer to their clients. Whenever I have a question or concern, it gets answered promptly and correctly!
author: Abby L.

review_title: Simplest CRM Ever for my small business
description: I run a small farmers market, and I am not very tech savvy. I use AddressTwo to manage all my customers & prospects, and then send email announcements almost daily. This system allows me to do sales and marketing in one.
author: Ryan T.
pros: It has CRM and Email Marketing in one system.
cons: I wish that I could synchronize it with Outlook.

description: I have been using AddressTwo for a year, and it has been a very great help to my business. With it, I almost never miss a follow-up contact, and I now have a robust base of prospects that I have followed up well with. Thanks!
author: Jonathan M.
cons: Can be a kittle cumbersome if you use it poorly.
